    "Failure to secure energy isolating devices under the control of an authorized employee"

  "rationale": "The misuse of a group lockbox fails to provide protection equivalent to the implementation of a personal lockout/tagout device, creating a critical safety hazard where energy could be re-introduced while employees are still exposed.",
